name: stitch-design-taste

# Stitch Design Taste — DESIGN.md

*Generated by `stitch-design-taste` skill for agent consumption.*

## 1. Brand Philosophy

> Stitch exists at the intersection of **craft** and **intention**. Every pixel, every micro-motion, every gap serves the narrative. We don't build interfaces — we build **environments** where content breathes, where hierarchy is felt before it's read, where the user never wonders "what do I do next?" because the design has already answered.

- **Form follows function** — but function should feel inevitable, not utilitarian.
- **No decoration without purpose** — if it doesn't serve the story, remove it.
- **Speed is a feature** — 60fps is baseline, not a goal.
- **Typography is the UI** — 70% of design is text; treat every character as a design element.
- **Whitespace is a material** — use it as deliberately as color or type.

## 2. Color System

### Primary Palette

| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--ink` | `#0A0A0B` | Primary text, headings, body copy |
| `--paper` | `#FAFAFA` | Page background, card surface |
| `--silk` | `#F0F0F0` | Secondary surface, hover states |
| `--border` | `#E5E5E5` | Dividers, input borders, card strokes |
| `--muted` | `#737373` | Secondary text, captions, metadata |
| `--signal` | `#0066FF` | CTAs, links, interactive elements |
| `--signal-hover` | `#0052CC` | Interactive hover states |
| `--error` | `#DC2626` | Validation, destructive actions |
| `--success` | `#16A34A` | Confirmations, positive states |

### Extended Palette

| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--amber` | `#F59E0B` | Warnings, badges |
| `--purple` | `#7C3AED` | Experimental features, AI |
| `--teal` | `#0D9488` | Alternative accent |
| `--rose` | `#F43F5E` | Love, saves, alerts |

### Dark Mode

| Token | Hex |
|-------|-----|
| `--ink` | `#F5F5F5` |
| `--paper` | `#0A0A0B` |
| `--silk` | `#1A1A1B` |
| `--border` | `#2A2A2B` |

## 3. Typography

### Font Stack

```
--display: 'Space Grotesk', 'SF Pro Display', system-ui, sans-serif
--body: 'Inter', 'SF Pro Text', system-ui, sans-serif
--mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', monospace
```

### Size Scale

| Token | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|-------|
| `text-hero` | clamp(3rem, 6vw, 6rem) | 500 | 1.0 | -0.03em | Hero headline |
| `text-h1` | clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem) | 500 | 1.1 | -0.02em | Section header |
| `text-h2` | clamp(1.5rem, 2.5vw, 2.25rem) | 500 | 1.2 | -0.01em | Subsection |
| `text-h3` | clamp(1.25rem, 1.5vw, 1.5rem) | 500 | 1.3 | 0 | Card title |
| `text-body` | 1rem | 400 | 1.6 | 0 | Paragraphs |
| `text-sm` | 0.875rem | 400 | 1.5 | 0 | Secondary text |
| `text-xs` | 0.75rem | 500 | 1.4 | 0.02em | Labels, captions |
| `text-mono` | 0.875rem | 400 | 1.7 | 0 | Code |

## 4. Spacing System

Based on 4px grid:

| Token | Rem | px |
|-------|-----|----|
| `space-1` | 0.25rem | 4px |
| `space-2` | 0.5rem | 8px |
| `space-3` | 0.75rem | 12px |
| `space-4` | 1rem | 16px |
| `space-6` | 1.5rem | 24px |
| `space-8` | 2rem | 32px |
| `space-12` | 3rem | 48px |
| `space-16` | 4rem | 64px |
| `space-20` | 5rem | 80px |
| `space-24` | 6rem | 96px |

## 5. Layout Grid

- **Max content width:** 1200px (75rem)
- **Grid columns:** 12-column fluid grid with 24px gap
- **Sidebar:** 320px (20rem) when applicable
- **Horizontal padding:** `clamp(1rem, 4vw, 3rem)`

## 6. Border Radius

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `radius-sm` | 4px | Inputs, small elements |
| `radius-md` | 8px | Cards, buttons |
| `radius-lg` | 12px | Modals, dropdowns |
| `radius-xl` | 16px | Large containers |
| `radius-full` | 9999px | Badges, pills |

## 7. Shadows

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `shadow-sm` | `0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)` | Cards resting |
| `shadow-md` | `0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05), 0 12px 16px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)` | Elevated cards |
| `shadow-lg` | `0 8px 24px -6px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 20px 32px -8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)` | Modals, dropdowns |

## 8. Motion

| Token | Duration | Easing | Usage |
|-------|----------|--------|-------|
| `motion-fast` | 150ms | `ease-out` | Hover, focus |
| `motion-base` | 250ms | `cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)` | Transitions |
| `motion-slow` | 400ms | `cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)` | Panel slides |
| `motion-enter` | 500ms | `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` | Entry animations |

## 9. Key Design Patterns

### Navigation
- Fixed top, `backdrop-filter: blur(12px)` with `--paper/80` background
- Left: logo/wordmark; Right: nav links + CTA
- Mobile: hamburger → full-height overlay nav with staggered link animation

### Hero Sections
- Left-aligned headline + eyebrow + CTA; optional right-side media
- Display type or rich media (video loop, interactive 3D, or grid of logos)
- Scroll indicator (animated chevron or progress bar)

### Cards
- Flat (`--paper` background, `--border` stroke)
- Optional hover: subtle scale(1.02) + shadow-md transition
- Content: image/caption → title → description → meta

### Data Tables
- Sticky header with `--silk` background
- Row hover: `--silk` highlight
- Sortable column headers with visual indicator
- Pagination: Previous/Next with page numbers

### Forms
- Labels above inputs, 8px gap
- Input focus: `--signal` border + ring, 250ms transition
- Error state: `--error` border + inline message below
- Grouped fields use `fieldset` with legend

## 10. Responsive Breakpoints

| Breakpoint | Min Width | Layout |
|------------|-----------|--------|
| xs | 0 | 1 column, stacked |
| sm | 640px | 2 columns |
| md | 768px | 2 columns, sidebar |
| lg | 1024px | 3 columns, full grid |
| xl | 1280px | 4 columns, max-width |

## 11. Accessibility Standards

- All interactive elements focusable and have visible focus ring (`--signal`)
- Color contrast ≥ 4.5:1 (AA) for normal text, ≥ 3:1 for large text
- `prefers-reduced-motion`: disable all non-essential animations
- `prefers-color-scheme`: automatic dark mode
- All images require descriptive alt text
- Form inputs associated with labels via `for`/`id`
- ARIA landmarks on all sections (`nav`, `main`, `aside`, `footer`)

## 12. Performance Budget

- **LCP:** < 1.5s
- **FID:** < 50ms
- **CLS:** < 0.05
- **First paint:** < 500ms
- **Time to interactive:** < 2s
